title: Tab Space (TabSpace)
text: Tab Space (TabSpace) Size of the space to be displayed between tabs, in either pixels or character cells. " TabSpace = Cells | Pixels px " Value Description 0 No space between tabs Cells Space size as number of character cells. Pixels px Space size as number of pixels. Usage Dynamic? Yes Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: Using in ProcScript You can use $properties or $fieldproperties to set or get the property and its value. For more information, see $properties and $fieldproperties . $fieldproperties(FLD) = "tabspace=5px" Copy Example: Tab Space in Pixels Tab Space is set to 5px : Figure 1. Tab Space of 5 Pixels Example: Tab Space in Character Cells Tab Space is set to 1 : Figure 2. Tab Space of One Character Cell Applies To utabex (TabEx) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
